product_results.title: N I K E I N C Air Max Torch 4 002ANTHRACITE/SILVER 9

summary.text: Customers find these shoes to be of very good quality and describe them as nice shoes. The fit receives positive feedback, with customers noting they are true to size and fit all their needs. Comfort is also well-received, with customers finding them very comfortable. The sizing appears accurate, with customers confirming they receive the right size.

authors_reviews.title: Attention pointure Retour Payant
authors_reviews.text: J'ai acheté la poiture 9 mais surprise trop serré, je dois le retourner pour changer de pointure.J'ai un compte Amazone prime mais surprise je dois payer les frais de retour 25$ !!!c'était une mauvaise expérience!
authors_reviews.author: Halim
